title: Particified
body:
This Mod adds a small yet noticable amount of particle features such as:

- Item Despawn Particles

- Jumping Dust Particles

- Water Splash Particles

- etc.

This Mod is ****Not Server Side**** which means it can't be used in servers! It is required.

Any further information will be given on the ****OpalLemon YouTube Channel****.

OH! and, before I forget, this mod is based on [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality) and [Effective](https://modrinth.com/mod/effective)!
